case_title: JOY TUN ET AL VS. TZEN JU YU

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TUN, JOY KHOO, CHELSEA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-19-2019 - CONTINUED FOR INTERPRETER TO MAR-19-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF IS PRESENT JOY TUN. PLAINTIFF CHELESE KHOO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TZEN JU YU IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-19-2019 - APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFFS PRESENT WITH BURMESE INTERPRETER ANIL VERMA; DEFENDANT PRESENT WITH BURNESE INTERPRETER RONNIE LEONG. PARTIES WERE PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. AFTER HEARING THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED, THE COURT TAKES THIS MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION. PLAINTIFFS' EXHIBITS RETAINED BY THE COURT. JUDGE JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-19-2019 - JUDGMENT.
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR INTREPRETER. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $109.00 FILED BY TUN, JOY KHOO, CHELSEA AS TO DEFENDANT YU, TZEN JU (KHI KHIN NWE) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-19-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TUN, JOY KHOO, CHELSEA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT YU, TZEN JU (KHI KHIN NWE) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-03-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
